props.name: maxVisible
props.type: integer >= 2 when collapse=true; ignored when collapse=false

nativePolicy: A named nav landmark contains an ordered hierarchy and exactly one final aria-current page.
Ancestors remain real links and executable or empty href values are rejected.
Responsive collapse keeps the first, tail, current, and hidden hierarchy available through native details disclosure.
collapse=false removes the compact duplicate hierarchy, details disclosure, hidden-message lookup, and compact accessibility output.
